memory_graph.name: Bus_Lookup_Project
observations: [2024-01-10 11:00] Anonymous Deployment Implementation: Documented the strategy to use Netlify Drop for anonymous URL generation.

[2026-02-02 14:47] Initial Production Readiness & Netlify Deployment Verification. Files: index.html, styles.css

[2026-02-02 15:51] Operational Analytics: Added Admin Dashboard stats for registration tracking and check-in logging.

[2026-02-03 19:35] Automated Regression Testing: Developed quick_debug.js using Playwright to verify view states.
[2026-02-04 03:00] Admin Data Orchestration: Implemented multi-criteria sorting (Name, Course, Status) for the dashboard.
[2026-02-04 03:39] Structural Accessibility Fix: Resolved scroll-blocking CSS issues in the main container.
[2026-02-04 03:55] Premium Brand Overhaul: Transitioned to 'B. BRAUN' corporate design language using Outfit fonts and glassmorphism.
